ko: 어떻게 지냈어? 잘 지냈어. 너는? 잘 지냈어.

en: Your secretary's on vacation. Everything's all back to normal.

en: I really am over him. I can't believe I was ever remotely interested in any of this.
And then he said I had some news.
She works in his office. She's a paralegal. Her name is Kimberly.
